title: notebook-draft-context input spec
description:
Inputs to ``notebook-draft-context`` — all roots caller-declared, OPAQUE.

``source_roots`` / ``input_roots`` default from the audit's RECORDED
configuration when ``audit_id`` is given (the one-declaration reuse rule):
an explicit list overrides, ``null`` falls back to the recorded config, and
an audit with no recorded config yields empty roots. ``inventory_roots`` is
draft-context-specific (extra opaque roots to list) and never defaulted.

template.description: Experiment-relative path to the template .py (jupytext percent format). Its slugs + cell prose are echoed verbatim and its imports are the declared engines the projection resolves.
template.title: Template

source_roots.description: OPAQUE import roots the engines resolve under. null => default from the audit's recorded config (when audit_id is given), else empty.
source_roots.title: Source Roots

input_roots.description: OPAQUE data roots whose files are listed in the inventory. null => default from the audit's recorded config (when audit_id is given), else empty.
input_roots.title: Input Roots

inventory_roots.description: Additional OPAQUE roots to list in the inventory (e.g. a configs dir). Never defaulted from the audit — draft-context-specific.
inventory_roots.title: Inventory Roots

audit_id.description: Optional notebook audit id. When given, absent source_roots / input_roots default from that audit's recorded configuration (interview.json audited_source, else the journaled record).
audit_id.title: Audit Id
